summary: Backend-only verification completed for P0 wh_5 bare negative routing fix. All 158 tests pass across 9 targeted test files. The fix correctly routes bare 'нет'/'no' at wh_5 to no_12v_supply branch (wh_5a), prevents downstream ignition questions (wh_6/wh_6a), prevents wh_6a loop via branch-aware step resolution, preserves positive path to wh_6, and preserves clarification behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: Branch trigger patterns correctly updated to accept bare negative replies (^\s*(?:no|nope|nah|нет|неа)\s*[.!?]*\s*$) at wh_5 and wh_6
getNextStepBranchAware correctly excludes branch steps from main-flow fallback, preventing wh_6a from appearing without active branch
buildRegistryContext now resolves fallback active step using branch-aware resolution
Route step-completion hardening correctly calls processResponseForBranch before getNextStepId
no_12v_supply branch (wh_5a→wh_5b→wh_5c) correctly defined with no mutuallyExclusive conflicts
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 wh_5 bare negative routing verified. The no_12v_supply branch correctly triggers from bare 'нет'/'no' at wh_5, routing to upstream 12V diagnostics (wh_5a/wh_5b/wh_5c). The no_ignition branch at wh_6 also accepts bare negatives. Branch-aware step resolution prevents wh_6a from appearing in main flow without an active branch. All regression tests pass including terminal-state, language-lock, and how-to-check behaviors.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: (1) Branch trigger patterns were too narrow - they required explicit 'no 12V' or 'no spark' phrases but didn't match bare negative replies like 'нет' or 'no'. (2) Legacy flat next-step fallback in getNextStep could surface branch steps like wh_6a when no branch was active, causing the loop. Fix: (1) Added bare negative pattern to no_12v_supply and no_ignition trigger regexes. (2) getNextStepBranchAware now excludes branch steps from main-flow fallback. (3) buildRegistryContext uses branch-aware resolution for fallback active step.
